snippet.title: Shrek 5 | Teaser Trailer Ufficiale
snippet.description:
Estate 2027 al cinema #Shrek5
Seguici anche su:
Facebook: / universalpicturesit 
Instagram: / universalpicturesit 
X: http://www.x.com/universalpicsit
TikTok: / universalpicturesit
shrek-ilfilm.it

La prossima estate, DreamWorks Animation vi invita a prendere parte a un’emozionante e magica avventura in una delle più amate franchise animate al mondo: Shrek 5.

La leggenda comica Mike Myers, il candidato al Premio Oscar® Eddie Murphy e Cameron Diaz tornano nei loro celebri ruoli di Shrek, Ciuchino e Fiona. La vincitrice dell’Emmy Zendaya (Odissea, Dune) su aggiunge al cast nei panni della figlia di Shrek e Fiona, Felicia, insieme a Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) e Skyler Gisondo (Superman, La rivincita delle sfigate) che prestano la voce ai fratelli di Felicia, Fergus e Farkle.

Shrek 5 è diretto dagli acclamati filmmaker e veterani della saga di Shrek Conrad Vernon e Walt Dohrn. Vernon ha preso parte alla squadra di regia di Shrek 2, candidato al Premio Oscar®, e ai film DreamWorks Animation Madagascar 3 - Ricercati in Europa e Mostri contro Alieni. Vernon ha anche prestato la voce all’amatissimo Omino pan di Zenzero, noto come “Zenzy”, in tutti i film dell’universo Shrek. Dohrn ha lavorato al secondo e al terzo film in qualità di sceneggiatore e artista, e al quarto come supervisore della sceneggiatura. Inoltre, Dohrn ha doppiato il personaggio di Tremotino in Shrek e vissero felici e contenti. Dorhn ha anche co-diretto Trolls e diretto Trolls World Tour e Trolls 3 – Tutti Insieme.

Torna a produrre il film la produttrice Gina Shay (franchise Trolls), che ha già prodotto Shrek e vissero felici e contenti, insieme al CEO di Illumination e candidato al Premio Oscar® Chris Meledandri (franchise Super Mario, franchise Cattivissimo Me / Minions). Il film è co-diretto da Brad Ableson (Minions 2 – Come Gru diventa cattivissimo; I Simpson).

Negli ultimi due decenni, il pubblico di tutto il mondo è stato affascinato dalle avventure divertenti e irriverenti dell’incompreso orco e del suo sgangherato gruppo di amici fiabeschi, ispirati al libro dell’acclamato autore William Steig. Sin dal 2001 con Shrek, vincitore del primissimo Premio Oscar® come Miglior Film d’Animazione, Shrek, CIuchino e Fiona (insieme ai loro amici, familiari e oppositori), sono diventati parte integrante della cultura popolare, ricordando al pubblico che la bellezza è negli occhi di chi guarda.

I quattro film di Shrek hanno incassato oltre 2.9 miliardi di dollari nel mondo, ispirando una tournée teatrale nel mondo, un musical a Broadway candidato a 9 Premi Tony e 12 Premi Drama Desk, oltre a un’immersiva esperienza a Londra e popolari eventi e attrazioni nei parchi a tema Universal Destinations & Experience.

snippet.title: Heartstopper Forever | Trailer ufficiale | Netflix Italia
snippet.description:
Heartstopper Forever arriva su Netflix il 17 luglio. In questo film che conclude la serie, Nick e Charlie sono inseparabili, ma quando Nick si prepara a partire per l'università e Charlie scopre una nuova indipendenza a scuola, la realtà di una relazione a distanza comincia a pesare su di loro. I dubbi prendono il sopravvento e il loro rapporto affronta la sfida più grande finora. Nel frattempo, anche i loro amici sono alle prese con gli alti e bassi dell'amore e dell'amicizia, confrontandosi con le difficoltà dolceamare della crescita e del cambiamento. I primi amori possono davvero durare per sempre?

Con il brano "Stupid Song", dal nuovo album di Olivia Rodrigo "You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love".

Guarda su Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82040750

Iscriviti: https://bit.ly/3989v8H

Netflix è uno dei più grandi servizi di intrattenimento del mondo. Offre un ampio e variegato catalogo di serie TV, film, giochi e programmi in diretta in numerose lingue. snippet.title: Hexed | Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Welcome to Hexe, the world of witches. Disney’s #Hexed is only in theaters November 25

The first trailer and poster for Disney’s “Hexed,” an all-new magical coming-of-age saga releasing in theaters November 25, are now available. The original animated film is Walt Disney Animation Studios’ 65th animated feature.
 
Joining previously announced voice cast members Hailee Steinfeld and Rashida Jones are seven-time Emmy Award® winner Tracey Ullman (“The Tracey Ullman Show,” “Tracey Takes On…,” “Bullets Over Broadway,” “Robin Hood: Men in Tights”), who voices the enchanted feather quill pen Ms. Quill, and Stephen Fry (“Gosford Park,” “Wilde,” “Jeeves and Wooster,” “V for Vendetta,” “The Hobbit” trilogy) as the magical journal Elias Quire.
 
The new trailer introduces the impulsive and unconventional teenage girl Billie (voiced by Hailee Steinfeld) and her cautious mother, Alice (voiced by Rashida Jones). When Billie accidentally unleashes secret magical abilities, she’s hurtled out of suburbia and into a magical realm called Hexe, where she’s greeted by Ms. Quill (voiced by Tracey Ullman) and Elias Quire (voiced by Stephen Fry). As Billie’s spectacle-filled journey unfolds, she uncovers family mysteries that could change the magical world of witches forever.
 
Director Fawn Veerasunthorn said, “A wonderfully strange phenomenon is happening all around Billie, something she can’t explain. She's someone who has felt miscast in her own life, and it takes leaving her normal world behind and entering a hidden world of wild, unhinged magic to begin to understand herself.”
 
"Hexe is a place where Billie begins to feel seen for the first time in her life,” director Jason Hand said. “She embarks on a journey of self-discovery that reveals a powerful connection to magic, and in the process uncovers long-held secrets about her family.”
 
Disney’s “Hexed” is directed by Fawn Veerasunthorn and Jason Hand, co-directed by Josie Trinidad, and produced by Roy Conli and Yvett Merino. The film opens exclusively in theaters November 25, 2026.
 
ABOUT WALT DISNEY ANIMATION STUDIOS
Combining masterful artistry and storytelling with groundbreaking technology, Walt Disney Animation Studios is a filmmaker-driven animation studio responsible for creating some of the most beloved films ever made. Disney Animation continues to build on its rich legacy of innovation and creativity, from the first fully-animated feature film, 1937's “Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs,” to the studios’ #1 feature of all time, 2025’s “Zootopia 2.” Among the studio's timeless creations are “Pinocchio,” “Sleeping Beauty,” “The Jungle Book,” “The Little Mermaid,” “The Lion King,” “Frozen,” “Moana,” and “Encanto.”

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

"Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: MUTINY (2026) | Trailer ITA | Il nuovo film action con Jason Statham
snippet.description:
Jason Statham torna protagonista in MUTINY, un adrenalinico thriller d'azione diretto da Jean-François Richet.

🎬 Dal 10 settembre al cinema.

Dopo l'omicidio del suo facoltoso datore di lavoro, l'ex soldato Cole Reed si infiltra clandestinamente a bordo di una nave mercantile per dare la caccia al responsabile. Ma quella che sembra una semplice missione di vendetta si trasforma presto in una pericolosa corsa contro il tempo tra complotti internazionali, tradimenti e segreti del passato.

snippet.title: BACKROOMS - CAMERA CAFÉ EDITION | Trailer con Paolo Bitta e Luca Nervi
snippet.description:
Arriva sul grande schermo una delle più famose creepypasta che hanno incuriosito milioni di utenti: il nuovo film horror, prodotto dalla A24, esplora la realtà  delle backrooms, infiniti spazi liminali che trasmettono un senso di alienazione e inquietudine. La prima opera del giovane regista Kane Parsons cerca di ricostruire le origini di questi singolari ambienti e così presenta al pubblico una delle prime backrooms mai esistite nella storia: una piccola area relax di un'azienda italiana dove nei primi anni 2000 sono avvenuti episodi a dir poco paranormali. Siete pronti a vivere questa esperienza al cinema e ad entrare in un luogo troppo "togo"?

snippet.title: Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2
_
Follow #Overwatch for the latest news:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch

snippet.title: Ya No Me Duele Igual ❤️‍🩹 | Bachata Romántica 2026 | Fusión Latina 2025
snippet.description:
🥀❤️‍🩹 “Ya No Me Duele Igual” es una bachata romántica sobre sanar después de una ruptura y descubrir que el tiempo puede transformar el dolor en fortaleza. Una canción para quienes aprendieron a soltar, seguir adelante y volver a creer en sí mismos.

Con guitarras llenas de sentimiento, una melodía envolvente y una letra que toca el alma, esta bachata refleja el momento en que miras atrás y te das cuenta de que ya no sufres como antes. 🌅🎶

✨ Porque algunas heridas no desaparecen de inmediato, pero un día despiertas y entiendes que ya no te duele igual.

🎶 Ideal para: • Superar una ruptura amorosa
• Escuchar de noche
• Sanar un corazón roto
• Reflexionar sobre el pasado
• Encontrar fuerza para seguir adelante

❤️ Gracias por escuchar y apoyar la música de Fusión Latina 2025. Cada reproducción, comentario y compartida ayuda a que estas canciones lleguen a más corazones.
